titleStmt.title: SII 20.165: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 165. (B.K. No. 96 of 1936-37.) BIJAPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This fragmentary record is dated in Śaka 1098, Durmukhi, Mārgaśira, ba. 8, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1176, November 25, Thursday.
The inscription registers a gift of income derived from cess on certain articles made by the Five-Hundred of Ayyāvoḷe, Mummuridaṇḍas and others to the temple of Nāgēs11varadēva.
The king is stated to have been ruling from Māsaṇūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiracuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāyasaṁbhavē . nama sivāya
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmatu kaḷacuryyapratāpacakravartti mallikārjjunadēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivraddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatārakaṁ saluttamire māsaṇūra nelevīḍinoḷu su
sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire . svasti samastavastuvistaravāra parītavāridhiparī
taviśēṣabhuvanavikhyātapaṁcasatavīrasāsanapadhavīprasiddharuṁ tatvajñāna nayavinayavijñāna
vīrabaṇaṁjudharmmapratipāḷanaruṁ vīralakṣmīviśāḷavakṣasthaḷaruṁ
baladēvavāsudēvakaṇḍaḷīmūlabhadravaṁśōdbhavaruṁ bhuvanaparā
kramōṁnatarumappa yayyāvoḷeyaynūrvva rsvāmigaḷuṁ mū
vattāṟubaruṁ muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷuṁ nānādēsigaḷuṁ cika
rūvigeya sthaḷadalli mahānāḍāgi stharāgi sakavarśa sāsi
rada toṁbhatteṁṭaneya 1098 neya durmmukhisaṁvatsarada mārggasi
ra bahuḻa 8 brihavāradaṁdu ṇadali kuḷḷirddhu śrīnāgēśvaradē
varige biṭṭa Āyaveṁteṁdaḍe māṟida hoṁge koṭṭalli
voṁmāna koṁḍali voṁmānanū bhattaṁ ḷagāgi koṭṭali yarevā
na koṁḍalli yarevāna . Ele koṭṭali 25 koṁḍalli 25 Aḍake hoṁge koṭṭa
lli 5 koṁḍalli 8 Ī Āyavaṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluvaṁtāgi koṭṭaru .
śrīge nele celuvināśraya sāgaraparivritayaśōlalā
mōṁnatiyiṁ mēgenisi cikka rūvige bhōgapurakeṇeyenalke sogavi
tōrkku . Ā vūroḷ dānacintāmaṇiyenisida moddeya kolise
yaṁṇana maganappa . sitapadmanābhanāmāṁkitanaṁ yasadamaḷacaritra
mahimāspadanaṁ kṣitiyoḷage māriseṭṭiya sutanaṁ mudadiṁ
siyaṁ pogaḷadarāru . Alliya
samastaprajegaḷuṁ mēlāḷike The stone is broken after this.
Digital edition of SII 20.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
